chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.176 of 2019 Amir Ali Charania Versus Rizwan Ahmed DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (priority) case 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.1264/2019 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 07.03.2024 Mr. Shafqat Gul Malik, Advocate for the Appellant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Shafqat Gul Malik, Advocate appeared on behalf of Mr. S.M. Jehangeer Akhtar, Advocate for the appellant, claims himself to be an associate of the firm and requests that he has been instructed not to press this appeal. The appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
